task.name: Interactive Reveal Capture
task.goal: Open a page, reveal hidden content, and export HTML plus snapshot artifacts.

environment.profile_expectation: Uses shared browser-cli daemon profile handling.
browser_assumptions: Page exposes a button named Reveal Message.
Revealed text becomes visible in the DOM.

steps: Locate the Reveal Message button by role/name.
Click the button and wait for Revealed text.
Capture rendered HTML and snapshot artifacts.
key_assertions: Text Revealed must appear before exporting artifacts.

retryable_steps: Re-capture a snapshot if the Reveal Message ref becomes stale.
Increase timeout if the page renders slowly.
recovery_hints.stale_ref_strategy: Capture a fresh snapshot and resolve the button by role/name again.
known_wait_points: Wait for Revealed text after clicking the button.

semantic_ref_notes: The task relies on semantic role/name lookup rather than DOM attributes.
output_interpretation_notes: interactive.html contains the post-click rendered DOM.
